state.description: Snake X velocity (movement direction and speed)
Snake Y velocity (movement direction and speed)
Current number of cells in the snake's body
Number of apples eaten (score), calculated as snake.maxCells - 4 (since it starts at 4)

mods.label: Game Frame Skip
mods.description: Number of animation frames to skip between game logic updates. Higher = slower. INVERTED: engine decreases this to speed up.

mods.label: Grid Cell Size
mods.description: The size of each grid cell in pixels. Affects visual scale, movement granularity, and implicitly the number of cells on screen. Changes snake's movement speed proportional to cell size.
mods.js_set: snake.dx = (snake.dx / grid) * VALUE; snake.dy = (snake.dy / grid) * VALUE; grid = VALUE;

mods.label: Snake Reset X Position
mods.description: The X position where the snake is initialized and resets after a game over. Changes the current snake X position, but the game's hardcoded reset (160) will overwrite this value on actual game over.

mods.label: Snake Reset Y Position
mods.description: The Y position where the snake is initialized and resets after a game over. Changes the current snake Y position, but the game's hardcoded reset (160) will overwrite this value on actual game over.

mods.label: Death Forgiveness
mods.description: Length the snake keeps after dying (normally resets to 4). A watcher enforces this on death events.

mods.label: Apple Attract Radius
mods.description: When > 0, apple respawns within this many cells of the snake head (easier to reach). 0 = fully random.

mods.label: Apple Initial X Position
mods.description: The X position of the apple at game start. Changes the current apple X position, but a new random position will be assigned when an apple is eaten or on game over.

mods.label: Apple Initial Y Position
mods.description: The Y position of the apple at game start. Changes the current apple Y position, but a new random position will be assigned when an apple is eaten or on game over.
